chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 275 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1181/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.05.2024 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements / comments have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3, 4 and 5, taken on record. Learned Additional Prosecutor General submits that this case has been disposed of as ‘C’ class because of compromise between the parties. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner; however, this petition, since has served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
